data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Aggregate reporting and trends', but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case mentions a monthly report showing NPS improvements and operational insights, it lacks concrete evidence of how aggregate reporting is implemented or accessed through API endpoints. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not provide sufficient detail to confirm the existence of aggregate reporting functionality.
gaps: Lack of evidence demonstrating the implementation of aggregate reporting and trends.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the aggregate reporting functionality.
